race.comment: EEZITOSORT (10) returns from a spell after finishing fourth over 1000m at Gunnedah back on January 19. Fitter for a placing in a recent trial. Ready to open her account. HELLAVALEGACY (11) stuck on well to finish second last start at Tuncurry, beaten less than a length. At her top now fourth-up and can figure prominently. BOOMTIME NOW (1) was in contention on the corner and finished third last time over 1200m at Inverell, beaten a length. Will trim down following recent racing. Nicely placed to run well again. RUAIRI (4) is yet to fire a shot this rep bit should be at his top now and gets a key switch in Gallagher. Keeping onside for a minor spot.
